subcodes.title: Words to Latimer and Remey, spoken on 1914-10-09
subcodes.first_line: Moderation, moderation. You must speak in such a manner that not a single soul will be offended. Bashir came into our household when he was a small child... The heavenly music is heart ravishing.
subcodes.subjects: @music and singing, @eulogies; reminiscences, @saddening another soul, @call to action, @Christian doctrine and practice, @wisdom [hikmat]
